goal: Upgrade Operations-Agents to v2: reduce bias, maximize efficiency/output
notes: 3-lens blind panel (assumptions/simplicity/bias) caught same-model correlation, parent's unchecked waiver authority, retro self-confirmation, and over-build (duplicated taxonomy + panel-by-default). All blockers fixed in v2.1. CAVEAT: panel itself ran all-opus (correlated blind spots) and no exogenous check was applied to THIS run - exactly the residual risk the v2.1 docs now name. QA skipped: artifact is markdown config with no executable behavior.

goal: Rebuild dashboard as project-agnostic live session dashboard (auto-populate, sortable, clickable, value-add to any project)
notes: 3-lens panel (correctness/UX/simplicity) found 5 blockers: poll re-entrancy, no deletion handling, markdown-link XSS, diffs=counts-only, no follow-latest. All fixed and VERIFIED by executing the real functions under a node DOM stub (diff returns line content; quoted-CSV intact; safeURL neutralizes javascript:; isText whitelist rejects png/zip). Convergent majors fixed: server-compat (absolute hrefs + honest docs re Live Server), phantom-change guard via content-compare, proactive error surfacing, onboarding legend, truncation banner, wired table sort. CAVEAT: panel all-opus (correlated); no live-browser QA available (headless) - verified pure logic + HTTP 200/304 behavior only, not visual rendering.

Dashboard VERIFIED working via headless Edge render (18 files, overview+tree+agent-panel+logs all populated) - the reported 'doesn't work' is a launch issue (file:// or no server), not a code bug. /retro cycle 2: blind reviewer rejected an overfit hard-gate proposal; applied lighter graceful residual-risk-waiver version instead. RESIDUAL-RISK WAIVER (per new convention): retro review was correlated single-model (opus), no exogenous check - human ratification pending.

goal: Powerhouse upgrade: live agent-activity stream + 2 new subagents (architect planner, optimizer perf/cost) wired into model-optimization
notes: 2-lens panel (integration/correctness + simplicity/bias). Fixed: attribute-context XSS on activity phase (whitelist), stale README 3-child diagram->honest 4+2, architect context-starvation->reads full context + advisory fleet, optimizer narrowed to perf/cost (APPLIES vs reviewer FLAGS), optimizer failed-reQA revert branch, activity.jsonl schema doc + cost-of-serial-stages note. Verified via headless Edge render (6 agents + live activity panel) + node JS parse + XSS check=0. RESIDUAL-RISK WAIVER: panel all-opus (correlated), no exogenous check - human ratification pending.

goal: Wire /build, /retro, /optimize-model as real Claude Code slash commands (.claude/commands)
notes: Small task - no review panel (per AGENT-STANDARDS: do not over-ceremony). Verified all 3 command files have valid frontmatter and every referenced skill/agent/doc path exists. Commands register when Claude runs with Operations-Agents as cwd.

msg: AUTH epic complete. Money bug root-caused + durable fix built. Blind panel REJECTED my reconcile-subscriptions change (billing/PII takeover via email reuse) -> reverted. Found + fixed a pre-existing live ATO in /api/subscribe. Password guards + newsletter /welcome interrupt built. tsc 0, next build exit 0. Staged for operator review; not deployed.

goal: Fix live charged-but-no-membership bug + login/identity/spam + newsletter opt-in interrupt (Weeknight production)
notes: 3 parallel investigators root-caused: webhook not subscribed to customer.subscription.* -> subscriptions row never written (durable checkout.session.completed fallback built). 2 blind security reviewers found 2 BLOCKERS: (1) reconcile-subscriptions-by-email = billing/PII takeover on email reuse -> REVERTED; (2) pre-existing ATO in /api/subscribe instant-access via referral cookie -> FIXED. Plus anti-regression guard, password confirm guards, newsletter /welcome. All tsc 0 + next build exit 0. NOT deployed - staged for operator (apply migration, Stripe events+resend, Supabase SMTP/auto-link, DNS). RESIDUAL: reviewers all-opus (correlated); no live prod test.
